detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=3e-8. Effect: OR/Beta=0.15 [0.097-0.203] unit increase. Initial sample: 11,513 European ancestry individuals.

notes: Study: Fatemifar G, Hum Mol Genet, 2013-05-23.
